## Severity

- [ ] **Blocker** — app unusable, data lost, share link broken, admin can't log in.
- [ ] **High** — feature broken, no workaround.
- [ ] **Medium** — feature broken, workaround available.
- [ ] **Low** — visual glitch, minor copy issue.
